title: Deobfuscator
description: Deobfuscate obfuscated/magic text. Reveals hidden players on servers such as the DonutSMP.
body: # Deobfuscator Client-side Minecraft mod that lets you deobfuscate obfuscated text. This mod can be used to counteract many servers that use plugins to "hide" players names (such as the DonutSMP). ![Deobfuscator Demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4c6c2d8a108d1796f47d2d58eb85e7a8bcc7d67.gif) This mod is toggleable with an in-game keybinding (default: `;`)
